title: GPO Scheduled Task Written to SYSVOL
description: Detects writes of a ScheduledTasks.xml (or GPT.ini bump) under the SYSVOL Policies path, the on-disk artifact left by GPO-abuse tools that push an immediate scheduled task to every machine the GPO applies to.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*SYSVOL*' or 'Command Line' like '*Policies*')) and (('Command Line' like '*ScheduledTasks.xml*' or 'Command Line' like '*Preferences*' or 'Command Line' like '*GPT.INI*' or 'Command Line' like '*gPCMachineExtensionNames*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate Group Policy Preference scheduled-task deployment
